frames.speech: The key ingredients plants need for photosynthesis, or inputs, are sunlight for energy, water absorbed through the roots, and carbon dioxide taken from the air.

The plant uses these inputs in its leaves. Chlorophyll, the green pigment, captures the light energy. This energy powers the conversion of carbon dioxide and water into glucose, which is the plant's food.
frames.svg_html:
<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,user-scalable=no"><style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#1A2B1A;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;height:100vh}svg{max-width:100%}</style></head><body><svg viewBox="0 0 400 300" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="400" height="300" fill="#1A2B1A"/>

  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="leafGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#81C784;stop-opacity:0.3"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#4FC3F7;stop-opacity:0.3"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- Sun -->
  <circle cx="80" cy="60" r="25" fill="#FFD700" opacity="0.8"/>
  <path d="M 80 35 L 80 15 M 80 105 L 80 85 M 55 60 L 35 60 M 105 60 L 85 60 M 60 40 L 40 20 M 100 80 L 80 100 M 60 80 L 40 100 M 100 40 L 80 20" stroke="#FFD700" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.8">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="0.8" dur="0.5s" begin="0.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="80" y="40" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="#F0EDD0" opacity="0">
    Sunlight
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Plant Leaf -->
  <path d="M 150 100 C 180 50, 250 50, 280 100 C 330 150, 330 200, 280 250 C 250 280, 180 280, 150 250 C 120 200, 120 150, 150 100 Z" fill="url(#leafGradient)" stroke="#81C784" stroke-width="3">
    <animate stroke-dasharray="1000" stroke-dashoffset="1000">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="1000" to="0" dur="0.7s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    </animate>
  </path>

  <!-- CO2 Input -->
  <path d="M 180 130 Q 190 120, 200 130 Q 190 140, 180 130 Z" fill="#CE93D8" stroke="#CE93D8" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate stroke-dasharray="100" stroke-dashoffset="100">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="100" to="0" dur="0.5s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    </animate>
  </path>
  <text x="200" y="115" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="#F5E3A0" opacity="0">
    CO2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Water Input -->
  <path d="M 150 200 L 130 220 L 150 240 L 170 220 Z" fill="#4FC3F7" stroke="#4FC3F7" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate stroke-dasharray="100" stroke-dashoffset="100">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="100" to="0" dur="0.5s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    </animate>
  </path>
  <text x="130" y="235" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="#F5E3A0" opacity="0">
    Water
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Glucose Output -->
  <path d="M 250 200 C 260 190, 270 190, 280 200 L 280 220 C 270 230, 260 230, 250 220 Z" fill="#FFB74D" stroke="#FFB74D" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate stroke-dasharray="100" stroke-dashoffset="100">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="100" to="0" dur="0.5s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
    </animate>
  </path>
  <text x="265" y="235" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="#F0EDD0" opacity="0">
    Glucose
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Oxygen Output -->
  <path d="M 200 160 Q 210 150, 220 160 Q 210 170, 200 160 Z" fill="#81C784" stroke="#81C784" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate stroke-dasharray="100" stroke-dashoffset="100">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="100" to="0" dur="0.5s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
    </animate>
  </path>
  <text x="220" y="145" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="#F5E3A0" opacity="0">
    Oxygen
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Title -->
  <text x="200" y="30" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#F0EDD0" opacity="0">
    Plant Inputs & Outputs
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg></body></html>

frames.text: The output is **glucose** (sugar) for energy and **oxygen** released into the atmosphere.
frames.speech: As a byproduct, photosynthesis releases oxygen, which is essential for us to breathe. So, plants take in what we exhale and give us back what we need to inhale!

frames.text: Photosynthesis occurs in the **chloroplasts** found mainly in leaf cells.
frames.speech: This entire food-making process happens inside tiny structures within plant cells called chloroplasts.
Chloroplasts are like the plant's tiny solar-powered kitchens. They contain chlorophyll, the green substance that captures sunlight.
frames.svg_html:
<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,user-scalable=no"><style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#1A2B1A;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;height:100vh}svg{max-width:100%}</style></head><body><svg viewBox="0 0 400 300" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="400" height="300" fill="#1A2B1A"/>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="grad1" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#81C784;stop-opacity:0.25" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#4FC3F7;stop-opacity:0.25" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="grad2" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FFB74D;stop-opacity:0.25" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#CE93D8;stop-opacity:0.25" />
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <g transform="translate(10, 10)">
    <text x="200" y="20" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#F0EDD0" text-anchor="middle">Where it Happens</text>

    <!-- Chloroplast Body -->
    <path d="M 190 70 C 150 50, 100 50, 80 80 C 50 110, 50 150, 80 180 C 100 210, 150 210, 190 190 C 230 210, 280 210, 320 180 C 350 150, 350 110, 320 80 C 280 50, 230 50, 190 70 Z"
          fill="url(#grad1)" stroke="#8BAB8B" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-dasharray="500" stroke-dashoffset="500">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="500" to="0" dur="0.8s" begin="0.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    </path>

    <!-- Outer Membrane -->
    <path d="M 190 70 C 150 50, 100 50, 80 80 C 50 110, 50 150, 80 180 C 100 210, 150 210, 190 190 C 230 210, 280 210, 320 180 C 350 150, 350 110, 320 80 C 280 50, 230 50, 190 70 Z"
          fill="none" stroke="#4FC3F7" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-dasharray="500" stroke-dashoffset="500">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="500" to="0" dur="0.8s" begin="0.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    </path>
    <text x="60" y="130" font-size="11" fill="#F0EDD0" text-anchor="middle">Outer Membrane</text>
    <text x="60" y="145" font-size="9" fill="#F5E3A0" text-anchor="middle">(teal)</text>

    <!-- Inner Membrane -->
    <path d="M 185 80 C 160 70, 130 70, 110 90 C 85 110, 85 140, 110 160 C 130 180, 160 180, 185 170 C 210 180, 240 180, 260 160 C 285 140, 285 110, 260 90 C 240 70, 210 70, 185 80 Z"
          fill="none" stroke="#80CBC4" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="400" stroke-dashoffset="400">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="400" to="0" dur="0.7s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    </path>
    <text x="120" y="130" font-size="11" fill="#F0EDD0" text-anchor="middle">Inner Membrane</text>
    <text x="120" y="145" font-size="9" fill="#F5E3A0" text-anchor="middle">(mint)</text>

    <!-- Stroma -->
    <path d="M 185 80 C 160 70, 130 70, 110 90 C 85 110, 85 140, 110 160 C 130 180, 160 180, 185 170 C 210 180, 240 180, 260 160 C 285 140, 285 110, 260 90 C 240 70, 210 70, 185 80 Z"
          fill="url(#grad2)" stroke="#81C784" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="400" stroke-dashoffset="400">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="400" to="0" dur="0.7s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    </path>
    <text x="190" y="130" font-size="11" fill="#F0EDD0" text-anchor="middle">Stroma</text>
    <text x="190" y="145" font-size="9" fill="#F5E3A0" text-anchor="middle">(green)</text>

    <!-- Granum (stack of Thylakoids) -->
    <g transform="translate(200, 120) scale(0.7)">
      <!-- Thylakoid 1 -->
      <path d="M 0 0 C 10 -10, 20 -10, 30 0 C 40 10, 40 20, 30 30 C 20 40, 10 40, 0 30 C -10 20, -10 10, 0 0 Z"
            fill="url(#grad2)" stroke="#FFB74D" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="120" stroke-dashoffset="120">
        <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="120" to="0" dur="0.6s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
      </path>
      <text x="15" y="-15" font-size="10" fill="#F0EDD0" text-anchor="middle">Thylakoid</text>
      <text x="15" y="-3" font-size="8" fill="#F5E3A0" text-anchor="middle">(orange)</text>

      <!-- Thylakoid 2 -->
      <path d="M 0 30 C 10 20, 20 20, 30 30 C 40 40, 40 50, 30 60 C 20 70, 10 70, 0 60 C -10 50, -10 40, 0 30 Z"
            fill="url(#grad2)" stroke="#FFB74D" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="120" stroke-dashoffset="120">
        <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="120" to="0" dur="0.6s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
      </path>

      <!-- Thylakoid 3 -->
      <path d="M 0 60 C 10 50, 20 50, 30 60 C 40 70, 40 80, 30 90 C 20 100, 10 100, 0 90 C -10 80, -10 70, 0 60 Z"
            fill="url(#grad2)" stroke="#FFB74D" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="120" stroke-dashoffset="120">
        <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="120" to="0" dur="0.6s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
      </path>
    </g>
    <text x="240" y="180" font-size="11" fill="#F0EDD0" text-anchor="middle">Granum</text>
    <text x="240" y="195" font-size="9" fill="#F5E3A0" text-anchor="middle">(gold)</text>

    <!-- Chlorophyll (represented as dots within Thylakoids) -->
    <circle cx="15" cy="15" r="3" fill="#81C784" opacity="0">
      <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    </circle>
    <circle cx="15" cy="45" r="3" fill="#81C784" opacity="0">
      <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    </circle>
    <circle cx="15" cy="75" r="3" fill="#81C784" opacity="0">
      <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    </circle>
    <text x="35" y="35" font-size="11" fill="#F0EDD0" text-anchor="middle">Chlorophyll</text>
    <text x="35" y="50" font-size="9" fill="#F5E3A0" text-anchor="middle">(green)</text>

    <!-- Connection: Chlorophyll to Thylakoid -->
    <path d="M 30 15 L 15 15" stroke="#FF6B6B" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="20" stroke-dashoffset="20" opacity="0">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="20" to="0" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
      <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
    </path>
    <path d="M 30 45 L 15 45" stroke="#FF6B6B" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="20" stroke-dashoffset="20" opacity="0">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="20" to="0" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
      <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
    </path>
    <path d="M 30 75 L 15 75" stroke="#FF6B6B" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="20" stroke-dashoffset="20" opacity="0">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="20" to="0" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
      <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
    </path>

  </g>
</svg></body></html>

frames.text: **Chlorophyll** is the green pigment that absorbs **light energy**.
frames.speech: Chlorophyll is crucial because it's the molecule that actually absorbs the sun's energy, making the leaves appear green.
Which gas do plants release as a byproduct of photosynthesis?
What is the main sugar produced by plants during photosynthesis?
frames.quiz_model_answer: The main sugar produced by plants during photosynthesis is glucose.

frames.speech: To recap, photosynthesis uses sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide to create glucose for the plant and releases oxygen, all happening in the chloroplasts thanks to chlorophyll.
